title: Route EDHOC post-KDF failure returns through secret wipe cleanup
description: Trigger: malformed or unauthenticated EDHOC messages after PRKs/session material have been derived. lichen/subsys/lichen/edhoc/edhoc.c has direct returns after derivation, including signature length checks at lines 584/587, KDF/signature failures at 606/616/649/666/688, responder KDF/encoding failures at 918/934/1046/1092, and Signature_3 failure at 1102. Impact: these paths bypass err_wipe, leaving eph_sk and PRK/session material in the context after failed authentication or malformed input. Convert post-KDF returns to set ret and goto err_wipe, and deduplicate the repeated signature_2 length check.
close_reason: Implemented fixes in assigned subagents and ran available focused checks; full Zephyr builds remain blocked by existing workspace/module setup issues.
